title: athroisma gracile subsp. gracile
intro: Athroisma gracile subsp. gracile, also known as a type of shrub native to Australia, is a plant in the family Compositae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Athroisma gracile subsp. gracile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
